meaning: n.区域,地方,管区,行政区,(美国各州的)众议院选区
examples: I drove around the business district.
The district is pock-marked with caves.
The Los Alamos district is solidly Republican.
There have been several arson attacks and intimidation directed against Catholic members of district policing partnerships.
The West Village has tiny, well-known boutiques, while the Meatpacking District is home to designer havens.
